The '''''Thunderflare''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] in service in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Its weaponry was more powerful than that of other [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] because energy from the ship's [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was transferred to its weapon systems. Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], ''Thunderflare'' was a common placement for junior officers due to its role as a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] patrol ship.<ref name="CCG-DS2" />

[[File:XX-9_Turbolasers_SWArmada.png|thumb|left|250px|''Thunderflare'' destroys a Nebulon-B frigate with its powerful turbolasers]]
[[Khurgee/Legends|Khurgee]] served aboard the ''Thunderflare'', where he was honored for bravery after rescuing five officers from a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] crash. He was later assigned to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] as a docking-bay security officer.<ref name="CCG-ANH" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ship was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tanda Pryl]] and was detached to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Villis Andal]]'s [[Elrood Sector Fleet|fleet]] that patrolled the Elrood sector.<ref name="OE" /> ''Thunderflare''{{'s}} patrols were restricted to the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the ''Thunderflare'' was assigned to the defense of [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II's]] construction. It later fought at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="CCG-obsidian10" /> As part of Death Squadron, the ship survived the battle. Captain Pryl refused to obey the new fleet commander, [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], and decided to return to the Elrood sector with her ship.<ref name="TEGTW" />
